description:
Convert your music to any format

MediaHuman Audio Converter is a free application for macOS and Windows. With it you can convert music in formats like MP3, AAC, WMA, OGG, etc. as well as in lossless formats like FLAC, Apple Lossless, AIFF, WAV (up to 32 bit).
- fixed potential crash when adding MP4 files
- fixed potential crash when conversion failed to start
- fixed potential crash during automatic update check
- fixed APE files losing album art during conversion
- fixed MP3 profiles not respecting the selected stereo mode
- fixed conversion getting stuck in "Converting" state
- improved performance for adding and managing large file lists
- minor improvements for stability
